description: You are a GIS Technician preparing GeoServer layers for your agency's public web map portal. Update the metadata for the Natural Earth Countries layer (ne_countries) in the 'ne' workspace (data store 'postgis_ne') to meet organization standards. Set the Title to 'World Political Boundaries (1:110m)' and the Abstract to 'Country boundaries from the Natural Earth 1:110 million scale cultural dataset. Includes sovereign states and dependent territories with administrative boundary polygons suitable for small-scale thematic mapping and reference cartography.' Add the keywords 'countries', 'political', 'boundaries', 'natural-earth', and 'admin-0'. Ensure the layer is Queryable and the Declared SRS is 'EPSG:4326'. GeoServer admin credentials: admin / Admin123!
